mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `petlog`.salon ( manage_no, name, address, phone, status, zip_code, crd_x, crd_y ) VALUES ( #{manageNo}, #{name}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{status}, #{zipCode}, #{crdX}, #{crdY} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), address = VALUES(address), phone = VALUES(phone), status = VALUES(status), zip_code = VALUES(zip_code), crd_x = VALUES(crd_x), crd_y = VALUES(crd_y);
mapper.select: SELECT id, manage_no AS manageNo, name, address, phone, status, zip_code AS zipCode, crd_x AS crdX, crd_y AS crdY, lat, lng FROM `petlog`.`salon` WHERE lat IS NULL OR lng IS NULL OR lat = 0 OR lng = 0

SELECT id, manage_no AS manageNo, name, address, phone, status, zip_code AS zipCode, crd_x AS crdX, crd_y AS crdY, lat, lng FROM `petlog`.`salon` WHERE status = '영업/정상' AND lat IS NOT NULL AND lng IS NOT NULL
